codeReview.summary: The fix adequately resolves the prior scrutiny blockers. `OpenBurnBarDaemonServer` now wires a concrete execution readiness gate into production service composition, `missionDispatchPacket` now fails closed when no gate is configured with explicit `.runtimeUnavailable`, and VAL-DAEMON-011 tests were updated to remove nil-gate pass-through expectations while preserving explicit reason-code assertions.

sharedStateObservations.observation: `mission-core-worker` requires adding/adjusting failing tests before implementation edits, but the worker performed implementation edits first and updated tests afterward.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: Fix transcript skeleton for session `23fa1fc0-cab3-40c9-95cc-275967e43108` shows `Tool: Edit` on production files before test edits (e.g., first implementation edit around skeleton line 753, test update around line 864).

summary: Pass. This fix closes the original failure by enforcing fail-closed readiness behavior in runtime composition and test expectations, with explicit reason-code propagation preserved.
